_comment: Project configuration template for MCU full-flow. Copy to config/project.json and fill in all paths for your site.

tools._comment: Set to 'auto' for auto-detection, or specify a tool name (e.g. 'vcs', 'dc_shell', 'innovus')

modules._comment: Site-specific module names for 'module load'. Only needed if tools are not already in PATH.

env._comment: Site-specific environment initialization. Set env_init_script to your site's EDA setup script, or leave empty if tools are already in PATH.

libraries._comment: Fill in paths for your PDK and standard cell library. Structure varies by foundry.

pdk._comment: Fill in paths for your process design kit.

physical_cells._comment: Cell names from your standard cell library. Check library documentation.

lsf._comment: LSF cluster configuration. Leave empty if not using LSF.
